summary: Iteration 108 - Declarative Phase E2E Testing: All 5 features tested successfully. Backend API tests passed (19/19). Frontend UI tests passed for DisputesListPage, DisputeDetailPage, AttendanceSheetPage, and AppointmentDetail CTA banners.

minor.issue: React key warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' for participant IDs - likely duplicate participant entries in test data

backend_pytest: ✅ test_01_list_disputes_returns_200 - GET /api/disputes/mine returns 200 with disputes list
✅ test_03_disputes_list_has_status_badges - Disputes have valid status values
✅ test_05_dispute_detail_has_summary - Dispute has declaration_summary with counts
✅ test_06_resolved_dispute_has_resolution - Resolved dispute has resolution details
✅ test_03_cannot_submit_twice - Cannot submit same sheet twice
frontend_playwright: ✅ DisputesListPage: 2 dispute cards found (1 open, 1 resolved)
✅ DisputesListPage: Status badges displayed correctly (amber for 'En attente de preuves', green for 'Résolu')
✅ DisputeDetailPage: data-testid='dispute-title' shows 'Litige — Test Dispute RDV'
✅ DisputeDetailPage: data-testid='show-evidence-form-btn' found for open disputes
✅ DisputeDetailPage (resolved): Resolution shows 'Résultat : on_time', 'Décidé par : Plateforme'
✅ AttendanceSheetPage: Declaration items with participant names displayed
✅ AttendanceSheetPage: 4 status selection buttons (Présent(e) à l'heure, Présent(e) en retard, Absent(e), Je ne sais pas)
✅ AttendanceSheetPage: Submit button enabled after selecting status
✅ AppointmentDetail: data-testid='declarative-cta-banner' found for collecting phase
✅ AppointmentDetail: Amber banner message about unverified presences
✅ AppointmentDetail: data-testid='dispute-active-banner' found for disputed phase
✅ AppointmentDetail: Red banner message about ongoing dispute

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ declarative_routes.py: Well-structured endpoints with proper authentication and error handling
✅ dispute_routes.py: Proper access control - users can only see disputes for appointments they participate in
✅ declarative_service.py: Comprehensive logic for sheet submission, analysis, and dispute resolution
✅ AttendanceSheetPage.js: Clean component with all required data-testid attributes
✅ DisputesListPage.js: Proper separation of open and resolved disputes
✅ DisputeDetailPage.js: Evidence submission form with proper validation
✅ AppointmentDetail.js: CTA banners correctly conditional on declarative_phase value
✅ French language used throughout with clear user-centric messaging
seed_data_creation: Created test data using /app/backend/tests/seed_declarative_test_data.py: attendance_sheets collection with pending/submitted sheets, declarative_disputes collection with open and resolved disputes, appointments with declarative_phase='collecting' and 'disputed'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Declarative Phase features fully tested. Key routes: /disputes (list), /disputes/:id (detail), /appointments/:id/attendance-sheet (sheet). Backend APIs: /api/attendance-sheets/{apt_id}, /api/attendance-sheets/{apt_id}/status, /api/attendance-sheets/{apt_id}/submit, /api/disputes/mine, /api/disputes/{id}, /api/disputes/{id}/evidence. All data-testid attributes verified: attendance-sheet-page, sheet-title, declaration-{pid}, select-{pid}-{status}, submit-sheet-btn, sheet-submitted-state, back-to-appointment, disputes-list-page, dispute-card-{id}, dispute-detail-page, dispute-title, dispute-summary, back-to-disputes, evidence-textarea, submit-evidence-btn, show-evidence-form-btn, dispute-resolution, declarative-cta-banner, go-to-sheet-btn, dispute-active-banner, go-to-disputes-btn.

features: Submit button disabled until all selected
Amber CTA banner for collecting phase
Red CTA banner for disputed phase
